metadata.title: Evening Whisper 🌙 - A little whisper each day
metadata.description: A short message to warm your heart and lift your spirit. Every evening, at the same time. Free for 7 days.

copy.c-1: A short message to warm your heart and lift your spirit.
copy.c-2: Every evening, at the same time.

hero.button: Let my first whisper find me tonight
hero.CTA-copy-1: Your first whisper arrives this evening

how-it-feels.title: How does it feel inside your phone at night?
how-it-feels.it-begins-copy-1: Without an app. Just a regular SMS.
how-it-feels.open-the-whisper-1: You open it. Just a few words… yet they
how-it-feels.the-habit-1: Every day at the same time.
how-it-feels.the-habit-copy-1: Something to look forward to each night
how-it-feels.the-feeling-1: Some feel nostalgic, others spark a smile. Each
how-it-feels.the-feeling-copy-1: Example Whisper (this is what the message looks like)

how-it-works.title: As simple as a deep breath

step-1.title: Sign up in moments
step-1.description: Just share your phone number — that’s all. A simple form, ready in a heartbeat

step-2.title: Your whisper, every evening
step-2.description: Each night, at the same time, a message created by a poet just for you arrives.

step-3.title: Enjoy your moment
step-3.description: Read it slowly, smile, save it — or share it with someone you love. It’s your pause in the day.

how-it-works.mini-CTA: So simple — your first whisper can arrive this very evening
how-it-works.button: Let my first whisper find me

reassurance-box.title: Your phone number stays safe
reassurance-box.description: 7 days free. Cancel anytime — no strings attached

phone.title: Verify your phone number
phone.description: After entering your phone number, you'll receive a verification code as a text message

login.title: Verify your email address
login.description: After entering your email address, you'll receive a verification code as an email

contact.title: Provide a few additional details
contact.description: Contact form asking for your name, email, message language and consent to the terms of service

already-subscribed.description: You already have an active subscription. You can cancel or extend it.

smartphone-notification-section.copy-1: Not random. Not AI. Each whisper is written by hand, crafted by a poet who has spent years shaping emotions into short forms.
smartphone-notification-section.copy-2: They are like little love notes — small enough to fit in a single SMS, yet warm enough to brighten your evening.

testimonials.title: What our readers whisper back…
testimonials.copy: Every line here comes from someone who has already welcomed Evening Whisper into their life. Their words say more than we ever could.

testimonial-1.quote: These whispers are little gems in my day. Sometimes a single sentence is enough to make me feel needed.
testimonial-1.author: Margaret

testimonial-2.quote: I open a message and suddenly the room feels brighter, even though nothing around me has changed.
testimonial-2.author: Patricia

testimonial-3.quote: Evening Whisper feels like a daily letter from life — tender, light, essential.
testimonial-3.author: Eleanor

testimonial-4.quote: My daughter signed me up. Now, every evening I wait for that one line that makes me smile. Best gift ever.
testimonial-4.author: Teresa

testimonial-5.quote: Thanks to them I feel once again like a young girl waiting for a letter from my beloved.
testimonial-5.author: Catherine

testimonial-6.quote: Your whispers are like a cup of tea by the fire — brief, but warming the soul in just the right way.
testimonial-6.author: Dorothy

testimonial-7.quote: Sometimes it feels like the words know exactly what I needed that day.
testimonial-7.author: Helena

testimonial-8.quote: I never knew a text message could feel like a touch — gentle, warm, soothing.
testimonial-8.author: Emily

pricing-section.title: A moment of warmth and kind words

faq-1.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq-1.answer-1: You can cancel your subscription at any time with no cancellation fees.
faq-1.answer-2: There are two ways to do this:
faq-1.answer-3: 1. Once your subscription begins, you’ll receive a message with a link to cancel.
faq-1.answer-4: 2. You can also log in to your account and cancel in the settings section.

faq-2.question: Does the service work without the internet?
faq-2.answer-2: As long as you have mobile signal, your Whispers will arrive.

faq-3.question: Does it work on any phone?
faq-3.answer-2: You don’t need an app to receive your Whispers.
faq-3.answer-3: All that’s required is your phone number.

faq-4.question: Do the messages ever repeat?
faq-4.answer-1: No – every Whisper is unique and written by an experienced poet.

faq-5.question: Is my phone number safe?
faq-5.answer-1: Yes – your phone number is protected.
faq-5.answer-2: We will never share your number with third parties.
faq-5.answer-3: We will never send unwanted messages, adverts or spam.

faq-6.question: Can I gift Whispers to someone else?
faq-6.answer-2: You can buy a subscription for someone special – all you need is their phone number.

bottom-cta.subtitle: Join thousands of readers who receive warm words every evening straight to their phone

terms.1: These terms and conditions ("Terms") set out the rules for using the Evening Whisper service, available at https://eveningwhisper.app ("Service").
terms.2: The Service is an online platform that allows users to receive daily SMS messages of a literary, emotional or nostalgic nature ("Messages").
terms.3: Using the Service constitutes acceptance of these Terms.

II.title: Scope and Nature of the Service

terms.1: The Service allows users ("User") to subscribe to daily SMS messages sent to the phone number provided by them.
terms.2: The Messages are of an artistic and entertainment nature and do not constitute commercial, promotional, psychological or therapeutic advice.
terms.3: The Service may offer a trial period, a monthly subscription, and a paid 30-day access period — each defined in the current price list available on the Service’s website.
terms.4: The Operator reserves the right to modify message content, delivery frequency, or subscription terms, provided this does not infringe on Users’ acquired rights.

1.text: To use the Service, the following conditions must be met:
subitems: possession of an active mobile phone number
consent to receive SMS messages
acceptance of these Terms

terms.2: The User undertakes to provide a valid phone number and is responsible for any consequences resulting from entering an incorrect one.
terms.3: The User may unsubscribe from receiving messages at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link included in the message or by contacting the Operator at: contact@eveningwhisper.app.
terms.4: The Service is not intended for persons under 18 years of age.

terms.1: If paid subscriptions are made available, information on pricing, duration, and payment methods will be presented to the User before purchase.
terms.2: Payments may be processed through external payment operators (e.g. Stripe, Autopay), in accordance with their respective terms and conditions.
terms.3: The User has the right to cancel their subscription at any time. In the event of cancellation, access to the Service will remain active until the end of the prepaid period.
terms.4: In case of an unauthorised payment, the User should immediately contact the Operator.

terms.1: The Operator of Users’ personal data is the Operator of the Service.
terms.2: Personal data (phone number, e-mail address, payment details) is processed solely for the purpose of providing the Service, managing subscriptions, and communicating with the User.
terms.3: The Operator processes data in accordance with applicable law, including Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council ("GDPR").
terms.4: The User has the right to access, rectify, delete, or restrict the processing of their data, as well as to withdraw consent at any time.
terms.5: Detailed information about personal data processing is provided in the Privacy Policy available on the Service’s website.

terms.1: The Operator shall not be held liable for interruptions in the operation of the Service caused by factors beyond its control, particularly telecommunication or server failures, or force majeure.
terms.2: The content of the Messages is subjective and artistic — it must not be interpreted as advice, recommendations, or behavioural guidance.
terms.3: The Operator shall not be liable for any emotional or interpretative consequences resulting from receiving the Messages.
terms.4: The User undertakes to use the Service in compliance with the law and with respect for the principles of social conduct.

terms.1: Complaints concerning the operation of the Service should be submitted via e-mail to: contact@eveningwhisper.app.

subitems: User’s contact details
a description of the issue
any supporting attachments documenting the situation

terms.6: The Operator will review the complaint within 14 working days from the date of its receipt.

terms.1: The Operator reserves the right to amend these Terms.
terms.2: If the User does not accept the amendments, they have the right to cease using the Service.

terms.1: In matters not covered by these Terms, the provisions of Polish law shall apply.
terms.2: Any disputes between the Operator and the User shall be settled by the court having jurisdiction over the Operator’s registered office.
terms.3: These Terms come into force on the date of their publication on the Service’s website.

terms.1: This Privacy Policy sets out the rules for processing personal data of users of the Evening Whisper service, available at https://eveningwhisper.app ("Service").
terms.2: The Controller takes particular care to ensure that users’ personal data is processed in accordance with applicable law, including Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 (GDPR).

II.title: Scope and Purpose of Data Processing

terms.1: The Controller processes users’ personal data only to the extent necessary to:
subitems: provide the daily SMS message service ("Messages")
manage subscriptions and payments
maintain contact with users (handling enquiries, complaints, and correspondence)
fulfil the Controller’s legal obligations
pursue the Controller’s legitimate interests, such as defending against claims or collecting due payments
terms.2: Providing personal data is voluntary but necessary to use the Service.

terms.1: The Controller may process the following categories of personal data:
subitems: mobile phone number – for sending SMS messages
e-mail address – for contact or subscription confirmation
payment details – when using paid subscriptions
technical data – such as IP address, device identifiers, browser and operating system data, for security and proper Service operation

terms.1: Personal data is processed on the following legal grounds:
subitems: Article 6(1)(b) GDPR – performance of a contract for the provision of electronic services
Article 6(1)(c) GDPR – compliance with legal obligations of the Controller
Article 6(1)(f) GDPR – pursuit of the Controller’s legitimate interests (e.g. claims, fraud prevention)
Article 6(1)(a) GDPR – user consent where applicable

terms.1: The Controller may share users’ personal data only with entities providing services on its behalf, in particular:
subitems: telecommunication service providers (e.g. SMS operators)
payment operators (e.g. Stripe, Autopay)
IT and hosting providers (e.g. Vercel)
accounting and legal service providers
terms.2: All such entities process data under written data processing agreements and are bound by confidentiality obligations.
terms.3: Personal data is not transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA) unless the recipient ensures an adequate level of protection in accordance with GDPR (e.g. by using standard contractual clauses).

terms.1: Personal data is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, and thereafter:
subitems: until consent is withdrawn – where processing is based on consent
for the duration of the contract – where processing is necessary for its performance
until the limitation period for potential claims has expired
for the period required by law – in relation to tax or accounting obligations

terms.1: Each user has the following rights in relation to their personal data:
subitems: the right to access their data and obtain a copy of it
the right to rectify (correct) data
the right to erasure (the “right to be forgotten”)
the right to restrict processing
the right to data portability
the right to object to processing based on the Controller’s legitimate interests
the right to withdraw consent at any time
terms.2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact the Controller via e-mail at: contact@eveningwhisper.app.
terms.3: Users also have the right to lodge a complaint with the President of the Personal Data Protection Office (UODO).

terms.1: The Service may use cookies and similar technologies to ensure proper website functionality, analyse traffic, and personalise content.
terms.2: Users may change their cookie settings at any time in their web browser.
terms.3: Restricting cookies may affect certain functions of the Service.

terms.1: The Controller applies appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against loss, destruction, unauthorised access, or disclosure.
terms.2: Access to data is granted only to authorised individuals who have been properly trained in personal data protection.

terms.1: The Controller reserves the right to amend this Privacy Policy.
terms.2: Users will be informed of any significant changes via a notice published on the Service’s website.
terms.3: The current version of the Privacy Policy is effective from the date of its publication on the website.
